description_long: This object is a large urban traffic light assembly mounted on a tall vertical pole with an extended horizontal arm. The structure supports two sets of three-lens traffic lights, a digital display, a circular speed limit sign, and two blue circular road signs. The traffic lights feature the standard red, yellow, and green lenses, while the digital display likely shows lane or timing information. The pole and arm are robust, likely made of metal, and the signs are attached at various points along the horizontal arm and pole. The entire assembly is designed to be highly visible to approaching vehicles and pedestrians. The surface appears smooth and painted, with colored lenses and sign faces for clear communication.
description: A large, pole-mounted urban traffic light assembly with multiple signal lights, digital display, speed limit, and road signs on a horizontal arm.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the vertical pole, horizontal arm, and the arrangement of traffic lights and signs.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the pole and the alignment of the attached lights and signs.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying all signal lights, digital display, speed limit sign, and blue road signs clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the arrangement of the lights and signs.
